landing.title: Dr Data 2.0

landing.audience.title: Who is Dr Data 2.0 for?
landing.audience.students.desc: Perform academic data analysis and generate professional reports.
landing.audience.freelancers.desc: Analyze client data and deliver professional insights.
landing.audience.smes.desc: Understand business performance and improve decisions.
landing.features.title: Key Features
landing.feat.academicAnalysis.desc: Statistical analyses tailored to university and research requirements.
landing.feat.businessAnalysis.desc: Powerful tools for business intelligence, KPIs, and performance tracking.
landing.feat.dataCleaning.desc: Detect and fix missing values, outliers, and inconsistencies automatically.
landing.feat.dataViz.desc: Create beautiful charts and dashboards to communicate your findings.
landing.feat.reportGen.desc: Export polished, publication-ready reports in PDF or Word.
landing.feat.projectMgmt.desc: Organize your analyses, history and files in a structured workspace.
landing.why.title: Why Dr Data 2.0?
landing.why.fast.desc: Get results in minutes, not hours. Your data is processed instantly.
landing.why.reports.desc: Generate publication-quality reports formatted to academic and business standards.
landing.why.academic.desc: Built to meet university and research institution requirements.
landing.why.business.desc: Powerful tools for business intelligence, KPIs, and performance tracking.
landing.why.advanced.desc: A comprehensive platform for all your data analysis needs.
